story.title: Stock Story - Lily
story.storyContent: Lily gave $500 to Max for a bakery. In return, Max shared 10% of profits. Lily learned that a stock means owning a small piece of a company. Over time, the bakery grew, and Lily's $500 became $550. Patience and research make investing rewarding.

quizzes.title: Stock Quiz 1 - Lily
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Lily: Let's learn!

? If the company does well, your stock value usually...
1) Stays the same
2) Goes up
3) Goes down
= 2

> Lily: A successful company tends to increase your stock's worth.

quizzes.title: Stock Quiz 2 - Lily
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Lily: Let's learn!

? What helped Lily's investment grow?
1) The business became more successful
2) Luck alone
3) Selling on the first day
= 1

> Lily: Business growth drives stock value.

quizzes.title: Stock Quiz 3 - Lily
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Lily: Let's learn!

? What is a wise approach to stock investing?
1) Sell immediately after buying
2) Hold for years with patience
3) Only buy very cheap stocks
= 2

> Lily: Patience and long-term thinking are key.

story.title: Stock故事 - 小娜
story.storyContent: 小娜给了小明100元做面包店生意。作为回报，小明分享30%的利润。小娜学到股票就是拥有公司的一小部分。随着时间的推移，面包店发展了，小娜的100元变成了130元。耐心和研究让投资有价值。

quizzes.title: Stock测验1 - 小娜
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小娜: 一起学习吧！

? 什么是股票投资的明智方法？
1) 买完立刻卖出
2) 耐心持有多年
3) 只买非常便宜的股票
= 2

> 小娜: 耐心和长期思考是关键。

1) 保持不变
2) 上涨
3) 下跌
= 2

> 小娜: 成功的公司会增加你的股票价值。

quizzes.title: Stock测验3 - 小娜
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小娜: 一起学习吧！

? 是什么让小娜的投资增长了？

3) 第一天就卖出
= 1

story.title: Fake Story - Mia
story.storyContent: Mia saw an ad for a video game at half price. The website looked real but had a typo. Mia remembered: 'If it's too good to be true, it probably is.' Mia checked the official store and reported the fake site. Later, Ben bought the cheap video game and got a broken CD. Mia learned to always verify before buying.

quizzes.title: Fake Quiz 1 - Mia
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Mia: Let's learn!

? What did Mia do to stay safe?
1) Bought the cheap item anyway
2) Asked an adult and verified
3) Kept it a secret
= 2

> Mia: Verification and communication keep you safe.

quizzes.title: Fake Quiz 2 - Mia
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Mia: Let's learn!

? If a deal seems 'too good to be true', you should...
1) Buy it immediately
2) Verify with official sources
3) Tell all your friends
= 2

> Mia: Always check before buying.

quizzes.title: Fake Quiz 3 - Mia
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Mia: Let's learn!

? What is a sign of a fake website?
1) Professional design
2) URL typos or strange addresses
3) High prices
= 2

> Mia: Typos in the URL are a big warning.

Mia checked the official store and reported the fake site. Later, Leo bought the cheap smartwatch and got a fake copy. Mia learned to always verify before buying.

quizzes.t2qContent:

2) Verify with official sources
3) Tell all your friends
= 2

> Mia: Always check before buying.

quizzes.t2qContent:

1) Ignore it
2) Report to a trusted adult
3) Buy it and complain later
= 2

> Mia: Reporting helps protect others.

quizzes.t2qContent:

? What can happen if you buy a fake product?
1) It lasts forever
2) It may break quickly or be unsafe
3) It's always as good as the real one
= 2

> Mia: Fakes are often poor quality.

story.title: Fake故事 - 小伟
story.storyContent: 小伟看到广告说运动鞋半价。网站看起来是真的，但网址有拼写错误。小伟想起：'如果好得不像真的，那很可能就是假的。'小伟查了官方商店并举报了假网站。后来小芳买了便宜的运动鞋，结果收到了砖头。小伟学会了买之前一定要核实。

3) 和真品一样好
= 2

> 小伟: 假货通常质量差。

quizzes.t2qContent:

3) 告诉所有朋友

story.title: Suicide Prevention Story - Sam
story.storyContent: Sam noticed Leo seemed sad for weeks, stopped playing, and said 'nothing matters'. Sam remembered: 'If worried about a friend, tell a trusted adult.' Sam told mom. mom talked gently with Leo and got help. Leo started counseling and learned to feel better. Leo later said, 'Talking saved my life. I\'m glad Sam spoke up.' Sam learned that asking for help is brave.

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention Quiz 1 - Sam
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge about suicide prevention
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sam: Let's learn!

? What can counseling or therapy provide?
1) Instant happiness
2) Tools to cope and hope for recovery
3) Only medication
= 2

> Sam: Counseling teaches skills and provides support.

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention Quiz 2 - Sam
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge about suicide prevention
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sam: Let's learn!

? What positive message does seeking help send?
1) You are weak
2) You are brave and strong
3) You should handle everything alone
= 2

> Sam: Asking for help is a sign of strength.

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention Quiz 3 - Sam
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge about suicide prevention
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sam: Let's learn!

? If a friend seems very sad for a long time, you should...
1) Ignore it
2) Tell a trusted adult
3) Promise to keep it a secret
= 2

> Sam: Telling an adult is the best way to help.

quizzes.t2qContent:
> Ava: Let's learn!

? If a friend seems very sad for a long time, you should...
1) Ignore it
2) Tell a trusted adult
3) Promise to keep it a secret
= 2

> Ava: Telling an adult is the best way to help.

story.title: Cerita Suicide Prevention - Sari
story.storyContent: Sari melihat Eko tampak sedih berhari-hari, berhenti bermain, dan berkata 'aku tidak peduli lagi'. Sari ingat: 'Jika khawatir tentang teman, ceritakan pada orang dewasa terpercaya.' Sari memberi tahu Ibu. Ibu berbicara lembut dengan Eko dan mendapat bantuan. Eko mulai konseling dan belajar merasa lebih baik. Eko berkata, 'Berbicara menyelamatkan hidupku. Aku bersyukur Sari bicara.' Sari belajar bahwa meminta pertolongan itu berani.

quizzes.title: Kuis Suicide Prevention 1 - Sari
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sari: Ayo belajar!

? Apa yang tidak boleh dijanjikan ke teman yang sedang berjuang?
1) Mendengarkan
2) Merahasiakan keinginan bunuh diri
3) Ada untuk mereka
= 2

> Sari: Keselamatan utama - jangan janji rahasia soal bunuh diri.

quizzes.title: Kuis Suicide Prevention 2 - Sari
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sari: Ayo belajar!

? Pesan positif dari mencari pertolongan?
1) Kamu lemah
2) Kamu berani dan kuat
3) Kamu harus selesaikan sendiri
= 2

> Sari: Minta tolong tanda kekuatan.

quizzes.title: Kuis Suicide Prevention 3 - Sari
quizzes.t2qContent:
> Sari: Ayo belajar!

? Jika sahabat tampak sangat sedih lama, Anda harus...
1) Abaikan
2) Beri tahu orang dewasa terpercaya
3) Berjanji merahasiakan
= 2

> Sari: Memberi tahu orang dewasa cara terbaik menolong.

story.title: Suicide Prevention故事 - 小静
story.storyContent: 小静注意到小明几周来都很悲伤，不再玩耍，还说'我不在乎了'。小静想起：'如果担心朋友，要告诉信任的成年人。'小静告诉了爸爸。爸爸温和地与小明交谈并获得了帮助。小明开始心理咨询，学会了感觉更好。小明后来说：'说出来救了我的命。我很高兴小静开口了。'小静学到了寻求帮助是勇敢的。

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention测验1 - 小静
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小静: 一起学习吧！

? 如果朋友长时间非常悲伤，你应该...
1) 忽略它
2) 告诉信任的成年人
3) 承诺保密
= 2

> 小静: 告诉成年人是帮助的最佳方式。

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention测验2 - 小静
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小静: 一起学习吧！

? 你永远不应该对正在挣扎的朋友承诺什么？
1) 倾听
2) 对自杀想法保密
3) 陪伴他们
= 2

> 小静: 安全第一 - 永远不要承诺对自杀保密。

quizzes.title: Suicide Prevention测验3 - 小静
quizzes.t2qContent:
> 小静: 一起学习吧！

? 寻求帮助传递了什么积极信息？
1) 你很软弱
2) 你勇敢且坚强
3) 你应该独自处理一切
= 2

> 小静: 寻求帮助是力量的表现。
